authorization_type.description: The method of authorization used for accessing the Lambda function URL.

cors.description: Configuration for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) settings for the Lambda function URL.

creation_time.description: The timestamp of when the Lambda function URL was created.

function_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lambda function associated with the URL.

function_url.description: The URL endpoint for invoking the Lambda function.

id.description: A unique identifier for the Lambda function URL configuration.

invoke_mode.description: The mode of invocation for the Lambda function URL, such as synchronous or asynchronous.

last_modified_time.description: The timestamp of the last modification made to the Lambda function URL configuration.

url_id.description: A unique identifier for the URL of the Lambda function.
